dimensions.name: artifact_existence
dimensions.evidence: All files present: schemas/reintegration.schema.json (draft-07 with required + pattern + enum + maxLength + description + examples); bin/frw.d/scripts/generate-reintegration.sh (jq-driven renderer); bin/rws extended with generate-reintegration + get-reintegration-json subcommands + reintegration section recognition in validate-summary + reject in update-summary; templates/reintegration.md.tmpl (placeholder-free, both markers); skills/implement.md + skills/shared/context-isolation.md (3-line additions each); bin/frw.d/scripts/launch-phase.sh worktree-complete hook (6-line addition, AD-8 respected); tests/integration/test-reintegration.sh (9 scenarios).

dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
dimensions.evidence: AC-R1 (Reintegration section + markers + update-summary rejection): scenarios 8 + 9 verify update-summary reintegration exits 3 with pointer to generate-reintegration; validate-summary requires both <!-- reintegration:begin --> and <!-- reintegration:end -->. AC-R2 (schema shape): scenario 1 validates generated JSON against draft-07 schema. AC-R3 (auto-populate on worktree-complete): scenarios 2, 3, 5 produce valid reintegration.json from synthetic worktrees; launch-phase.sh hook wired in 2l. AC-R4 (schema is interface contract): get-reintegration-json exit 2/0/3 all tested in scenario 6; stdout is pure JSON. AC-R5 (template skeleton placeholder-free): scenario 4 asserts both markers present + zero {{ placeholders. AC-R6 (round-trip idempotency): scenario 7 confirms byte-identical JSON modulo generated_at; scenario 1 confirms stable key ordering via jq --sort-keys.

dimensions.name: file_ownership_conformance
dimensions.evidence: All writes within ownership: schemas/reintegration.schema.json, bin/rws, bin/frw.d/scripts/generate-reintegration.sh, bin/frw.d/scripts/launch-phase.sh (minimal 6-line addition), templates/reintegration.md.tmpl, skills/implement.md, skills/shared/context-isolation.md, tests/integration/test-reintegration.sh. Confirmed NOT touched (parallel peer config-cleanup's territory): bin/frw.d/install.sh, bin/frw.d/lib/common.sh, bin/frw.d/scripts/upgrade.sh, bin/frw, commands/next.md, schemas/{definition,state,promotion-targets}.*.*, docs/architecture/config-resolution.md, all config-cleanup tests.

dimensions.name: test_execution
dimensions.evidence: test-reintegration.sh: exit 0, 40/40 scenarios. Regression: test-rws 34/34 (existing rws tests still green post-extension), test-rescue 13/13, test-sort-seeds + test-sort-todos 18/18.
